source_of_truth_label: test(workflow): add signed approval pre run guard pass
approval_expiration: 7 calendar days from timestamp OR upon completion of 30-scenario validation run, whichever comes first

accepted_exact_values.exact_services: Twilio Sandbox SMS API (inbound/outbound stubs to sandbox numbers only); Vapi test assistant API (call stub, no live outbound); Resend test mode API (test inbox only, no live sends); RoofLeadHQ sandbox/staging Supabase project (scoped tables only)
accepted_exact_values.exact_test_accounts: Twilio sandbox test number (Jason-designated); Vapi test assistant ID (Jason-designated); Resend test inbox address (Jason-designated); Summit Peak Roofing Demo LLC operator sandbox login (fake demo roofer scope only)
accepted_exact_values.exact_environment: Local dev workstation at RoofLeadHQ repository root; RoofLeadHQ sandbox/staging Supabase project (explicitly not production)
accepted_exact_values.exact_credentials_env_api_webhook_bounda: Named vars only (no values logged): TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_TEST_NUMBER, VAPI_API_KEY, VAPI_ASSISTANT_ID, RESEND_API_KEY, SUPABASE_SANDBOX_URL, SUPABASE_SANDBOX_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SANDBOX_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY — sandbox/staging only; production vars forbidden
accepted_exact_values.exact_external_call_boundary: Twilio Sandbox SMS API (send/receive to sandbox numbers only); Vapi test API (assistant stub calls only); Resend test API (test inbox only); Supabase sandbox project REST/RPC only — no production endpoints, no CRM, no billing
accepted_exact_values.exact_production_data_boundary: No production Supabase reads/writes; no production homeowner/roofer PII; sandbox/staging tables scoped to Summit Peak Roofing Demo LLC test data only; local fake demo fixtures allowed
accepted_exact_values.exact_schema_auth_rls_security_boundary: No schema migrations; no auth changes; no RLS policy changes; no security config changes — read/write sandbox data only within existing schema
accepted_exact_values.exact_public_route_webhook_scheduler_cro: No new public routes; no webhook exposure; no scheduler/cron/dispatcher activation; no inbound webhook handlers — local dry-run and sandbox API stubs only
accepted_exact_values.exact_messaging_contact_permission_bound: Sandbox test numbers only; explicit opt-in for Jason-designated test contacts; STOP/opt-out honored immediately; no live homeowner SMS/email/calls; compliance hold before any send
accepted_exact_values.exact_calendar_appointment_boundary: Calendar stub events in sandbox only; no live Google/Outlook integration; manual coordination fallback required; inspection/appointment records in sandbox DB only
accepted_exact_values.exact_reporting_csv_boundary: Local fake-data CSV exports and sandbox admin dashboard views only; no live CSV delivery to external systems; no production reporting emails; audit logs in sandbox scope only
accepted_exact_values.exact_stop_conditions: unexpected live service indicator; unexpected production data access; unexpected external call outside boundary; unexpected schema/auth/RLS change; unexpected public route/webhook/scheduler; unexpected billing/payment behavior; real-data ambiguity; approval ambiguity; safe readiness failure; backend build failure (per NO_GO_STOP_CONDITION_CHECKLIST)
accepted_exact_values.exact_approval_expiration: 7 calendar days from explicit Jason sandbox/test-mode approval timestamp OR upon completion of 30-scenario validation run, whichever comes first
accepted_exact_values.exact_one_time_use_limitation: Single-use approval per sandbox/test-mode validation batch; invalidated after 30 scenarios complete, any STOP_AND_ROLL_BACK, or approval expiration; reuse requires new explicit Jason approval with refreshed exact values

similar scripts are not treated as approved substitutes
